## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss content performance, optimization strategies, and future content plans.](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance shows significant growth: 100+ more clicks and 47,000 more impressions week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Content refreshes are yielding positive results, with cumulative weekly increases in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Team discussed strategies for optimizing low CTR articles and leveraging comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [Plans to integrate conversion data and CRO changes to improve bottom-of-funnel metrics](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Total performance updated in Airtable under "Performance"](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Over 100 clicks more from last week](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [47,000 increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Positive growth trends over last 28 days and week-on-week](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Cumulative impressions and clicks over past seven weeks presented](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### GrowthX vs Webstacks Article Performance

  - [Comparison of first two months of indexing](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [GrowthX: 95 articles indexed](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Webstacks: \~15 articles indexed in first two months](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Clicks and impressions stacking up favorably for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### Content Refresh Results

  - [32 refreshes completed in total (batches 6 and 7 done this week)](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Batch 1 (launched Sept 15) showing 71% increase in clicks per day](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Cumulative weekly increase in clicks and impressions presented](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [\~10-15 extra clicks per week coming from content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=745.0)

### Optimization Strategies

  - [Addressing low CTR issues, particularly for high-impression articles](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Looking into metadata, best-ranking pages, and content improvements](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Implementing frameworks for meta title optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Considering shift towards more refreshes (10 refreshes, 5 new pieces) in future](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)

### New Content Plans

  - [Focus on CMS comparison articles (rows 28-44 in assignments)](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Discussing potential for creating dedicated comparison pages vs blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Emphasis on strong internal linking structure for comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

### Conversion and Engagement Metrics

  - [Team interested in tying content performance to lead pipeline and deals](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Plans to implement CRO changes and share pipeline data](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
  - [Discussion on setting up conversion tracking for new blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

### Future Content Strategies

  - [Exploring programmatic content generation for comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Potential for creating technology-specific pages on the new site](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Considering development of plugins or tools as lead magnets](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
  - [Hybrid approach combining AI-generated content with expert-written pieces](https://fathom.video/share/zCy4iCWxmQ9kLxMfuaR2hMAAY6pGBs99?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
